title: Plotinus, Ennead 6.1: On the Genera of Being I
description: Tractate 1 of Ennead 6 of Plotinus' Enneads — the foundational text of Neoplatonism.
introduction: Tractate 1 of Ennead 6 of Plotinus' Enneads — the foundational text of Neoplatonism.

translation.text: From the On the Genera of Being I: All things flow from the One. The One is beyond being and beyond knowledge. The soul ascends to the One through philosophical contemplation, leaving behind first the body, then the world of forms, finally even the Intellect, until it stands face to face with the source of all.
